meta.name: TIPI Ten-Item Personality Inventory
meta.description: The TIPI is an ultra-brief version of the Big Five personality scale, using only 10 items to quickly assess five personality dimensions: Extraversion, Agreeableness, Conscientiousness, Emotional Stability, and Openness. It is suitable for time-limited research and rapid screening.
meta.author: Gosling, Rentfrow & Swann (2003)
meta.reference: Gosling SD, Rentfrow PJ, Swann WB Jr. A very brief measure of the Big-Five personality domains. J Res Pers. 2003;37(6):504-528.
meta.instruction: Here are a number of personality traits that may or may not apply to you. Please indicate the extent to which you agree or disagree with each statement. I see myself as:

extraversion.label: Low
extraversion.description: Low extraversion; tends toward introversion, quietness, and solitude. This personality dimension score is elevated and may significantly influence your behavior patterns and relationships across various contexts. Further exploration is recommended.
suggestions: Consider discussing the impact of personality traits with a counselor
Learn effective communication and conflict management skills
Develop flexible coping strategies
Focus on personal growth and improving relationships

extraversion.label: Average
extraversion.description: Average extraversion; able to balance socializing and alone time. This indicates that this personality dimension falls within the typical range commonly seen in the general population.
suggestions: Understanding your personality traits supports personal growth
Every person has unique strengths and value in their personality
Flexibly apply your traits in different situations

extraversion.label: Above Average
extraversion.description: Above average extraversion; tends to enjoy social interaction and group activities. This level of trait expression is slightly above average but within the normal range of individual variation.
suggestions: Learn how this trait influences your behavior and relationships
Leverage the positive aspects of this trait
Learn adaptive coping strategies when needed
Communicate with others to foster mutual understanding

extraversion.label: High
extraversion.description: High extraversion; outgoing and enthusiastic, enjoys social activities, and is energetic. This indicates that this personality dimension falls within the typical range commonly seen in the general population.
suggestions: Understanding your personality traits supports personal growth
Every person has unique strengths and value in their personality
Flexibly apply your traits in different situations

agreeableness.label: Low
agreeableness.description: Low agreeableness; tends toward independence, competitiveness, and questioning others. This personality dimension score is elevated and may significantly influence your behavior patterns and relationships across various contexts. Further exploration is recommended.
suggestions: Consider discussing the impact of personality traits with a counselor
Learn effective communication and conflict management skills
Develop flexible coping strategies
Focus on personal growth and improving relationships

agreeableness.label: Average
agreeableness.description: Average agreeableness; able to balance cooperation and assertiveness. This indicates that this personality dimension falls within the typical range commonly seen in the general population.
suggestions: Understanding your personality traits supports personal growth
Every person has unique strengths and value in their personality
Flexibly apply your traits in different situations

agreeableness.label: Above Average
agreeableness.description: Above average agreeableness; tends to be friendly and considerate. This level of trait expression is slightly above average but within the normal range of individual variation.
suggestions: Learn how this trait influences your behavior and relationships
Leverage the positive aspects of this trait
Learn adaptive coping strategies when needed
Communicate with others to foster mutual understanding

agreeableness.label: High
agreeableness.description: High agreeableness; compassionate, cooperative, and caring about others. This indicates that this personality dimension falls within the typical range commonly seen in the general population.
suggestions: Understanding your personality traits supports personal growth
Every person has unique strengths and value in their personality
Flexibly apply your traits in different situations

conscientiousness.label: Low
conscientiousness.description: Low conscientiousness; tends to be flexible and spontaneous, with less focus on details and planning. This personality dimension score is elevated and may significantly influence your behavior patterns and relationships across various contexts. Further exploration is recommended.
suggestions: Consider discussing the impact of personality traits with a counselor
Learn effective communication and conflict management skills
Develop flexible coping strategies
Focus on personal growth and improving relationships

conscientiousness.label: Average
conscientiousness.description: Average conscientiousness; able to balance order and flexibility. This indicates that this personality dimension falls within the typical range commonly seen in the general population.
suggestions: Understanding your personality traits supports personal growth
Every person has unique strengths and value in their personality
Flexibly apply your traits in different situations

conscientiousness.label: Above Average
conscientiousness.description: Above average conscientiousness; tends to be organized and self-disciplined. This level of trait expression is slightly above average but within the normal range of individual variation.
suggestions: Learn how this trait influences your behavior and relationships
Leverage the positive aspects of this trait
Learn adaptive coping strategies when needed
Communicate with others to foster mutual understanding

conscientiousness.label: High
conscientiousness.description: High conscientiousness; thorough, responsible, organized, and highly self-disciplined. This indicates that this personality dimension falls within the typical range commonly seen in the general population.
suggestions: Understanding your personality traits supports personal growth
Every person has unique strengths and value in their personality
Flexibly apply your traits in different situations

emotional_stability.label: Low
emotional_stability.description: Low emotional stability; prone to anxiety and mood swings. Your mental health concerns are notable and may be impacting daily functioning. Speaking with a mental health professional is recommended.
suggestions: Schedule a mental health professional assessment as soon as possible
Make sure you have trusted people around you for support
Follow the treatment plan recommended by your professional
Maintain basic daily self-care routines
If you feel overwhelmed, call a mental health helpline for immediate support

emotional_stability.label: Average
emotional_stability.description: Average emotional stability; generally able to manage emotions well most of the time. This indicates that your overall mental health is in good condition, with all areas of functioning working well.
suggestions: Continue maintaining a healthy lifestyle and mental well-being
Focus on personal growth and positive experiences
Maintain regular exercise and social activities
Remember to seek support when facing difficulties

emotional_stability.label: Above Average
emotional_stability.description: Above average emotional stability; tends to be calm and resilient. Mild psychological concerns are common in life. Focusing on self-care and healthy coping strategies can help maintain well-being.
suggestions: Focus on self-care with good routines and regular exercise
Learn simple relaxation and stress-relief techniques
Stay in communication with people you trust
If symptoms persist or worsen, consider consulting a professional
Maintain a positive outlook on life

emotional_stability.label: High
emotional_stability.description: High emotional stability; calm, composed, highly resilient, and not easily affected by emotions. This indicates that your overall mental health is in good condition, with all areas of functioning working well.
suggestions: Continue maintaining a healthy lifestyle and mental well-being
Focus on personal growth and positive experiences
Maintain regular exercise and social activities
Remember to seek support when facing difficulties

openness.label: Low
openness.description: Low openness; tends toward tradition, practicality, and preference for the familiar. This personality dimension score is elevated and may significantly influence your behavior patterns and relationships across various contexts. Further exploration is recommended.
suggestions: Consider discussing the impact of personality traits with a counselor
Learn effective communication and conflict management skills
Develop flexible coping strategies
Focus on personal growth and improving relationships

openness.label: Average
openness.description: Average openness; able to balance innovation and tradition. This indicates that this personality dimension falls within the typical range commonly seen in the general population.
suggestions: Understanding your personality traits supports personal growth
Every person has unique strengths and value in their personality
Flexibly apply your traits in different situations

openness.label: Above Average
openness.description: Above average openness; tends to be curious and imaginative. This level of trait expression is slightly above average but within the normal range of individual variation.
suggestions: Learn how this trait influences your behavior and relationships
Leverage the positive aspects of this trait
Learn adaptive coping strategies when needed
Communicate with others to foster mutual understanding

openness.label: High
openness.description: High openness; curious, creative, and open to new experiences and perspectives. This indicates that this personality dimension falls within the typical range commonly seen in the general population.
suggestions: Understanding your personality traits supports personal growth
Every person has unique strengths and value in their personality
Flexibly apply your traits in different situations
